auth_token.description: Sentry internal integration / auth token. Used only for Bearer auth; never logged.

base_url.description: Sentry API base URL, e.g. https://sentry.io or https://<self-hosted-host>. Required: legacy derives this from a hostname config value (default sentry.io), but that cross-key derivation has no engine mechanism today (see docs.md Known limits), so this bundle requires the fully-formed URL instead.

organization.description: Organization slug; required to read the issues, events, and releases streams.

project.description: Project slug; required to read the issues and events streams.

max_pages.description: Maximum pages; use 0, all, or unlimited to exhaust the stream.
